voice_match_evidence: Chapter-2 voice is didactic, corrective, slightly stern. The 2.39 engineering layer matches with a structurally-distinctive subnote — the META verse requires a meta-voice. The engineering layer accomplishes this: 'This verse is structurally unusual: Krishna stops arguing a position and instead names the architecture of his own teaching.' The voice steps back into a structural register without becoming pedantic. The closing operational claim ('work no longer collapses into one substrate where neither discipline is fully practiced') returns to the chapter's specific voice. Coherent with 2.30 (also a structural-pivot verse with similar meta-voice), 2.38 (corrective tone), 2.47 (operational specificity). The voice handles the META-level distinction without flattening it.
